_meta.purpose: Session handover — captures all context relevant to continue this session or pick up in a new one after compaction or restart.
_meta.supersedes: ~/Git/llm-rag/AsteroidOS/HANDOVERS/20260627_nemo_nougat_port_handover.json (different project — that one is the AsteroidOS porting session, not this repo)
_meta.update_this_file: Each session should update the 'session_state' block and append to 'session_log'.

project.name: asteroid-docking-bay
project.description: Python 3 CLI + web UI for managing USB hub port power and ADB operations for a fleet of AsteroidOS smartwatches docked on a w541 ThinkPad.
project.co_maintainers: two-eyes principle — co-maintainer reviews all PRs

hub_host.role: Always-on hub controller. No GitHub SSH key — code gets here via rsync from p14s.
hub_host.bottle_installed_via: sudo pacman -S python-bottle  (NOT pip — Arch PEP 668)

watches.note: Recently moved to test 'mondo hub' — may need remapping. Check config.
In serials dict but not currently mapped to a port.

mondo_hub.topology: VIA Labs VL813 root (4 ports, ppps) cascading into 6 Huasheng sub-hubs (4 ports each, ganged) = 24 usable downstream ports
mondo_hub.group_switching: Works — switching VIA root port 2 (uhubctl -l 1-3 -p 2 -a off) powers the entire cascade off. ADB devices reappear on restore.
mondo_hub.individual_port_switching: Does NOT work — Huasheng sub-hubs are ganged. Physical front-panel rocker switches are mechanical only.
mondo_hub.vbus_verdict: CONFIRMED data-line only (tested 2026-07-02). Both levels tested: individual ports (ganged, no switching at all) and group switch (VIA root port 2 off — VBUS stays live, watch continues charging). The 2109:2813 VIA Labs chip in this product does NOT cut VBUS despite ppps flag.
mondo_hub.issue_filed_and_closed: moWerk filed #665 to add to uhubctl supported list, then closed after discovering per-port switching is impossible.

critical_hardware_finding.title: ALCOR 05e3:0606 does data-line disconnect only, NOT true VBUS switching
critical_hardware_finding.detail: All four docked hubs are ALCOR 05e3:0606 USB 2.0. uhubctl marks them as ppps=true and all commands exit 0. Port state correctly shows '0000 off' after switching. BUT: VBUS (5V) stays live on the pin. Watches keep charging regardless of port state. USB data lines are disconnected (ADB drops, device vanishes from USB enumeration) so ADB-based operations work. The 'mondo hub' exhibited the same behaviour despite LED blinking during cycle tests.
critical_hardware_finding.implication_for_battery_management: The charge timer (the original core feature) does NOT work with these hubs. Watches charge continuously.
critical_hardware_finding.implication_for_adb_ops: Reboot, Bootloader, Flash nightly all work fine — they use ADB which needs data lines, not VBUS.
critical_hardware_finding.fix: Buy hubs with confirmed true VBUS switching. Yepkit YKUSH is confirmed. Check uhubctl compatible devices list: https://github.com/mvp/uhubctl#compatible-usb-hubs
critical_hardware_finding.uhubctl_permissions: uhubctl runs as user 'mo' without sudo. Sysfs path fails with Permission denied but libusb fallback works (exit 0). Fixed spurious log noise by adding -S flag to uhubctl_set_power() call.

api_routes: POST /api/off/<codename>      → {ok, confirmed}  (USB data cut only on ALCOR hubs)
POST /api/poweroff/<codename> → {ok, adb_shutdown, confirmed}  (adb shell poweroff + 3s + USB cut)
GET  /api/flash/<codename>    → SSE stream of flash log lines
ui_features: Hub grouping with ├─/└─ tree connectors and hub header rows
Empty ports shown at bottom of each hub group (Refresh button only)
Power column: pill toggle (green=ON / grey=OFF) + ↺ cycle icon
Battery cell: red < low_threshold, green in-band, muted > high_threshold
⏻ Halt submenu (appears when power ON): Power off | Reboot | Bootloader | ✕ — auto-collapses 4s
⚡ Charge button: starts charge cycle, live countdown in battery cell
Flash nightly: SSE log stream in inline expandable box below row
Refresh button: row pulses subtly, button pulses blue for 10s
All buttons: :active scale-down press feel, touch-action:manipulation for tablets
Title: Archivo Narrow 700 22px with ✨ ⋆ ˚ ✦ decoration matching CLI header
Red row flash if uhubctl confirmed=false (hub didn't actually switch)
module_level_state_dicts: _charge_tasks — tracks in-progress charge cycles with charge_end_ts

cli_commands.status: show all watches with hub, port, power, smart, ADB, battery
cli_commands.charge: manual charge cycle (adb wait → charge_duration_minutes → off)
cli_commands.check-charge: periodic logic run by systemd timer
cli_commands.map: auto-discover hub ports and assign codenames
cli_commands.test-ports: re-test per-port PPPS for configured ports
cli_commands.discover: scan ADB for watches and print serial+codename

known_bugs_and_limitations.description: All current hubs do data-line disconnect only. Battery management non-functional.
known_bugs_and_limitations.workaround: None in software. Need different hubs.

known_bugs_and_limitations.description: Manhattan MondoHub II VIA Labs root switch (2109:2813) confirmed data-line only — VBUS stays live even when group switch reports off. Individual ports (Huasheng ganged sub-hubs) also non-functional for switching.
known_bugs_and_limitations.workaround: None in software. Need different hubs.

known_bugs_and_limitations.description: Unplugging a watch does not remove its row — the port mapping persists in config. Row stays, ADB column shows —.
known_bugs_and_limitations.workaround: Manual edit of config.json to remove port entry, or add Unmap button (not yet implemented).

pending_features_discussed_not_implement.detail: Store per-watch charge history in a separate JSON. 3-cycle minimum before trusting calculated duration. Rolling average Δ%/min. Readjust after every charge.
pending_features_discussed_not_implement.storage: Separate JSON file per watch (not config.json)

pending_features_discussed_not_implement.detail: Remove a port-to-codename mapping from config.json via the UI. Currently requires manual config.json edit.

session_log.summary: Built entire web UI from scratch: Bottle-based serve command, SSE flash streaming, hub grouping with tree connectors, battery color-coding, charge countdown, power toggle pill, halt submenu, UI polish pass (Archivo Narrow, animations, touch feel). Debugged ALCOR hub VBUS-only issue. Added uhubctl -S flag and read-back verification. Renamed flash-all→flash. Documented hub hardware limitation.
Investigated mondo hub — also data-line only. User gave up on VBUS management for now. Created this handover document. Established .investigation-logs/ incremental logging practice.
